description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a combination of dark and light surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a paved driveway with two parked cars, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a small tree adjacent to the house. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is recessed and understated, lacking ornate details but emphasizing clean lines. The overall structure is compact, with a focus on functional outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a paved driveway, and a furnished patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark facade, two parked cars on the driveway, and the main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light-colored walls, patio with outdoor furniture, and a detached tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the tree close to the patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the dark exterior, driveway, and a clear view of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with minimal detailing, no steps or porch, emphasizing clean lines and simplicity.
